hero.body: Anime, manga, and manhwa tattoos only. Blackwork, fine-line, and restrained color — no portrait styles, no other subjects.

manifesto.headline: Anime, manga, and manhwa only — original work, in skin.
manifesto.body1: Every piece drawn from the same energy as the art form itself — bold contour lines, dramatic motion, the weight of a decisive panel. Jesuke only does anime, manga, and manhwa tattoos. No other styles. No exceptions.
manifesto.body2: Based in Bulacan, Philippines. Working under the handle Jesuke — no name on the door, no face on the feed. What there is: the work, a clear point of view, and one way to reach out.
manifesto.body3: Blackwork, fine-line, and restrained color — not portrait style. Single sessions to multi-session builds. Custom pieces and available flash.

steps.title: Inquiry
steps.body: Send a commission inquiry with your idea, size, and placement. No full brief needed — a direction is enough to start.

steps.title: Consult
steps.body: We align on concept, style weight, and session estimate. A deposit secures your slot and covers drawing time.

steps.title: Stencil
steps.body: The design is drawn to fit your anatomy. You review the stencil placement before any ink touches skin.

steps.title: Session
steps.body: Single-session blackwork up to a forearm. Larger builds are split across sessions with healing time in between.

steps.title: Aftercare
steps.body: A full aftercare sheet at the end of every session. Two to four weeks for the ink to settle. Touch-ups handled if needed.

commission.heading: A piece for you.
commission.body: Anime, manga, or manhwa subjects only. Describe the mood, the placement, the feeling.

professional.heading: Work together.
professional.body: Collaborations, licensing, press, and other professional arrangements. A different door, a different conversation.

booking.heading: Commission a piece.
booking.body: Anime, manga, and manhwa subjects only — no other styles. Blackwork, fine-line, and restrained color accepted; no portrait style. Describe your idea: a direction, a mood, a placement. No finished brief needed.
rules: Blackwork, fine-line, and restrained color — no portrait style
Deposit required to secure a slot
Bulacan, Philippines — local and visiting clients welcome

bookingThanks.heading: Inquiry sent.
bookingThanks.body: It went through. You will hear back within a week if the project is a fit — check your inbox, including the spam folder.
bookingThanks.note: No reply after a week means the slot is full or the brief is not a match for this season.

professional.heading: Work together.
professional.body: For collaborators, licensing enquiries, press, and other professional arrangements. All sessions are in Bulacan, Philippines — no travel. Use this form, not the commission form.

professionalThanks.heading: Inquiry sent.
professionalThanks.body: Professional inquiries are reviewed and responded to directly — expect to hear back within a few days.
professionalThanks.note: If the inquiry is time-sensitive, note that in your message.

sections.title: What we collect
sections.body: This site collects only what you voluntarily submit through the two contact forms — a commission inquiry (name, contact, idea, size, placement, budget, availability, and optional reference links) or a professional inquiry (name, organisation, role, inquiry type, dates, and message).

sections.title: How it is used
sections.body: Submissions are transmitted directly from your browser to Formspree (TLS-encrypted), forwarded to the artist's inbox, and stored in the Formspree dashboard. This site does not process, store, or log submitted data.

sections.title: Third parties
sections.body: Data is not sold or shared with third parties beyond Formspree for routing and delivery. No analytics cookies are set. No social embeds run on this site.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of any data you have submitted by emailing security@jesuke.ink. Published client photos are removed on request.

sections.title: Photo consent
sections.body: Photographs of client tattoos are published only with the client's express consent, recorded at the time of the commission consult.

notFound.heading: Nothing here.
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist, or has moved. The work is still there.

commission.label: Commission inquiry
commission.name: Name
commission.ideaHint: Anime, manga, and manhwa subjects only. Blackwork, fine-line, or restrained color — no portrait style. Describe the mood and feel; no need to name a specific title or character.
commission.referencesHint: Paste image URLs here — do not upload files.
commission.consent: I consent to Jesuke storing and using the information I submit here to respond to my inquiry.
commission.errorFallback: That did not send. Check your details and try again, or message on Facebook.

errors.name: Name is required.
errors.idea: Describe your idea so we can respond meaningfully.
errors.size: Approximate size helps with the quote.
errors.consent: Please confirm your consent to continue.

professional.label: Professional inquiry
professional.name: Name
professional.errorFallback: That did not send. Check your details and try again, or message on Facebook.

errors.name: Name is required.
errors.message: A brief message helps us triage the inquiry.
